All Classes All Packages

R

RegisterRequest - Class in request
Creates a new user account, generates 4 generations of ancestor data for the new user, logs the user in and returns an auth token.
RegisterRequest() - Constructor for class request.RegisterRequest
 
RegisterResult - Class in result
Reports success or failure
RegisterResult() - Constructor for class result.RegisterResult
 
RegisterService - Class in service
Handles the register functionality
RegisterService() - Constructor for class service.RegisterService
 
registerUser(String, String, String, String, String, String) - Method in class service.RegisterService
Creates a new user
request - package request
 
result - package result
 
retrieveAllEvents(String) - Method in class service.EventService
All family members of the user
retrievePerson(String) - Method in class service.EventIDService
Retrieves an event from a event ID
retrievePerson(String) - Method in class service.PersonIDService
Retrieves a person from a person ID
retrievePerson(String) - Method in class service.PersonService
All family members of the user
